transcript.clean_text: after the fun of the mountains up to javel jace and telly picacha taking the lead of the uae tour it was time for the sprinters to have their fun crosswinds were going to be a feature of the day on this enormous run of 182 kilometers to al marjan well it twists and turns all over the place but largely crosswinds on the day echelon's guaranteed but when two intermediate sprints along the way with bonus seconds there in up for grabs and our final destination with a nasty switchback with 2.7 kilometers to go what we rolled out with all the jerseys to the fore and if they're moaned of course by teddy bucca he in his pomp and indeed pushing on into what was to be a busy day but not before a breakaway to establish itself gasprom just taking on to the back wheel of alessandro tornelli a four-man breakaway it was kuchekov cuckola the czech champion both from gasprom along with their teammate dimitri strakov in the black jersey well crosswinds generated a lot of activity out there and there were bonus seconds up for grabs but not least tanya picacho wanted those bonus seconds leading this race by only of course two seconds but he managed to grab some that was the point well alpha and fenix were also motivated they thinking about the green jersey on the back of philippson and the points lying out in the desert but not to be taken lightly either the bonus seconds i guess off they went the red jersey sprinting against green terrific to see and at the line teleport catcher picking up two vital seconds and doubling his margin over pippo garner who was so impressive in the mountains yesterday he trailed him by two seconds at the start of the day and with those sprint seconds now doubled up to four ghana himself was on chasing duties throughout much of the day looked extraordinarily fresh and lively for a big man who carried his frame so well up jabel jace a one breakaway court another one forming and strykov was determined to remain out front and the black jersey was up there albeit now with two from bardiani carnival joining his teammate tornelli was in the original move also there kuchetkov we still hadn't heard the last of michael kirkla though we've been in that original break he would go on a solo late on when you struggle to find water in this part of the world you struggled to find points as well but not struggling in the intermediate sprints and dominating that competition struck off well and truly in black 41 points nearest rival to him in that intermediate sprints competition phillipson on 14. looks all bar decided for the russian so they re-gathered themselves with 60 kilometers to go until of course that man again cuckola off the front trying to tempt someone else to join him perhaps but in the end he was to go solo and the gap was an impressive one built up to two and a half minutes with 17 kilometers to go in fact we were starting to ponder whether he would be caught at all caught out by a puncture danny pacquacher well considering his margin of advantage overall was only four seconds this was good news for ineos grenadiers and pippo ghana potentially adam yates well the pelton was already in racing mode with 4.5 kilometers to go and pikachu tried his level best to get to the back of the pack he made it didn't look too panicked at all swift bike change one ready for him of course and so he would stay in the lead heading of course into tomorrow's sprint and ultimately javel a feet 2.9 kilometers from home and a big turn in the offing they went round the lollipop and we were destined to have a sprint finish well they were leaving it very very late all barbara hanscrow who set up sam bennett away he went olive koi on his wheel in the yellow and black of jumbo visma and of course the green jersey of jasper phillipson phillipson went to the center of the road good work too by maluceli but in the end it was at phillipson yet again whether it be the intermediate sprints he was 10th in the time trial don't forget second sprint win for him and a green jersey upon his back and it looks like he's going to carry that all the way to the end brilliant work no sign of mark cavendish a mechanical late on we understand mark of course having taken a big hit on the road to yavel jace perhaps forgiven for having a day off today he'll be back sprinting again i'm sure tomorrow phillipson taking it ahead of koi sam bennett in third place head of malaceli barbier rounding out your top five viviarni looking lively demar disengaged from his own team again dainese kanter well what it's all about is the leader's jersey and it sits upon the back of teddy pacquiao he's faced all kinds of adversity but seems to be equal to just about everything and his margin of advantage is indeed four seconds as we head for expo dubai another sprinting day on stage six so two more stages to come drama absolutely guaranteed at the uae tour every single day has provided yet another story we can't wait for the next chapter well 180 kilometers it will be for two expo dubai surely one for the sprinters once again unless of course somebody is cheeky enough to break away it can happen especially if the cross winds blow who will kick up a storm though but you have to stay here to find out you
